name: io.github.basis-protocol/oracle-mcp
description: Basis Protocol Oracle — score reads for SII, PSI, RPI, and accruing indices.
title: Basis Protocol — Oracle

tools.name: get_stablecoin_scores

tools.description: Full score breakdown for a specific stablecoin.

tools.description: Wallets with the most capital at risk.

tools.description: Unscored assets ranked by capital exposure.

tools.name: check_transaction_risk
tools.description: Composite risk assessment for a transaction.

tools.name: get_methodology
